description_long: This is a square decorative pillow featuring a geometric pattern on the upper half, composed of repeating blue-gray diamond and triangle shapes on a light background. The lower half of the pillow displays a series of horizontal stripes in varying shades of gray and white, creating a modern, layered look. The pillow appears to be well-stuffed, giving it a plump and inviting appearance, with slightly pointed corners and smooth, taut fabric. The surface texture looks soft and matte, likely made from a woven textile such as cotton or a cotton blend. No visible tags, labels, or brand logos are present on any side. The overall design is contemporary and would suit a variety of urban or modern interior settings.
description: A square, plump pillow with a blue-gray geometric pattern on top and horizontal gray and white stripes below, made from soft woven fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric pattern on the upper half and horizontal stripes on the lower half, with the pillow's plumpness and pointed corners clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side edge view displaying the pillow's thickness and the way the patterns converge at the seam, with minimal surface detail visible.
description_view_2: Back view nearly identical to the front, showing the same geometric and striped pattern, confirming the design is present on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side edge view, similar to view 1, highlighting the pillow's thickness and the symmetry of the pattern at the seam.
